column2: Apps - Memory used by user-space applications
column3: PageTables - Memory used to map between virtual and physical memory addresses
column4: SwapCache - Memory that keeps track of pages that have been fetched from swap but not yet been modified
column5: Slab - Memory used by the kernel to cache data structures for its own use (caches like inode, dentry, etc)
column6: Cache - Parked file data (file content) cache
column10: Hardware Corrupted - Amount of RAM that the kernel identified as corrupted / not working
